speaker: Narrator
text: It was the following day, Blanche and a professor had been chatting about her project.

speaker: Professor
text: Hey there's your partner! Didn't you tell me she was sick?

speaker: Blanche
text: What? I thought she would've stayed home for the day?

speaker: Narrator
text: Christina waves at Blanche from across the hallway. There was a newfound radiance in her face. It was a brand new Christina. Blanche walked forward to meet her.

speaker: Blanche
text: You've recovered from your illness.

speaker: Christina
text: Yeah.

speaker: Christina
text: About the project, I must admit that the way you went through the archives to find evidence of the worm from centuries ago surprised me.

speaker: Christina
text: Were you already aware of that incident before we started?

speaker: Pasaya
text: Christina.

speaker: Narrator
text:
It's early enough in the morning that students hadn't yet come into the lecture hall yet. The professor walks off and Blanche and Christina both take a seat together.
	
	Christina exhales when she relaxes into the seat, as she does, the same aroma starts exiting her mouth, just like back at the restaurant. 
	
	Blanche is drawn in further with every word. She's trying to suppress the heat building up in her body. Beads of sweat formed on her forehead. 
	
	Christina notices and scoots over to place her hand on her forehead.

speaker: Christina
text: Are you sick?

speaker: Blanche
text: Maybe I got it from you.

speaker: Christina
text: My bad.

speaker: Blanche
text: I think I'm fine.

speaker: Blanche
text: I'll check if it's the case after the presentation.

speaker: Christina
text: I've put everything you sent and all of my own conclusions from my won research-

speaker: Christina
text: It's here in these papers.

speaker: Blanche
text: Ah, good.

speaker: Narrator
text:
Students are starting to flood in as the class is about to start. The other groups give their speeches about their research while Christina and Blanche fight their nerves for when they go last.
	
	For Christina, it's more than just nerves that is messing with her insides.
	
	The room is mostly comprised up of female students majoring in marine biology, parasitology, and ecology.

speaker: Narrator
text:
Christina sat through a series of brief presentations. One was an especially interesting one, where pharmaceutical pollution had affected the behavior of salmon. 
	
	Before long, it was now Christina's turn to stand in front of her peers.

speaker: Narrator
text:
Some of these students had known her since she first moved to Stockholm several years ago, when she had been a different person, a more open person. 
	
	Some of them had known her almost as a friend. None of them had seen her like this. She was speaking with a confidence they had never seen from her before, she had the room spellbound.

speaker: Narrator
text:
Before long it was Christina and Blanche's turn. They anxiously walked up on stage and proceeded to give their presentation despite how shaky their hands were.
	
	Christina goes on to explain the life cycle of a particular parasite in Tyresta lake. Blanche continues where Christina leaves off by giving some supporting details from their research.

speaker: Narrator
text:
When they finish, the room erupts into a standing ovation. Christina triumphantly smiles with her mouth open, exhaling that familiar smell into the room.
	
	The peach scent wafting about the room intoxicates even the professor, who clearly indicates that their project is passing. 
	
	Christina is hounded by the girls of the class, who are desperately providing feedback and offering to spend time with her to work on her research. 
	
	However, Christina's eyes seem only to be fixated on Blanche right next to her. Eventually the class starts to depart from the hall, but the duo remain in the room.

speaker: Blanche
text: You did the work.

speaker: Christina
text: Come on I couldn't have done it without you.

speaker: Blanche
text: I have another thing to do after this, but after that, would you like to meet with me for fishing?

speaker: Christina
text: Fishing? Again?

speaker: Blanche
text: Yeah, but not for school this time. I actually had fun doing it.

speaker: Christina
text: Sure, I'll wait for you in the cafe near the library. We could order some things before we go.

speaker: Blanche
text: Great, thank you Christina.

speaker: Narrator
text:
Christina dashes off in the wrong direction. Leaving the masssive crowd confused. 
	
	What had happened was a suggestion by the worm inside her head, who had discovered a new trick by poking around her brain. That certain emotional responses could be rerouted or simply turned off as needed. 
	
	That a well-placed tendril could manipulate the body to move in a way that Christina could never notice. That she could take over when necessary, if that's what Christina wanted.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Why are you so afraid of her?

speaker: Pasaya
text: This isn't the way to the library either.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Oh I get it, you haven't been interested in anything but this vtuber in years.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Pathetic!

speaker: Pasaya
text: She wants you, you know.

speaker: Christina
text: I don't want her in that way!

speaker: Pasaya
text: Don't kid yourself, we both know how you really feel. You know that no one else be as close to you as her.

speaker: Christina
text: I... don't think I have the heart to tell her how I feel.

speaker: Pasaya
text: How about a proposition? If you let me take over your body, I can ask her out for you.

speaker: Christina
text: I will think about it. Can't risk you screwing up.

speaker: Pasaya
text: You should have more faith in me.

speaker: Christina
text: Now, which way was the library again?

speaker: Narrator
text:
The worm and Chrstina take a few hours to bury themselves in supplemental research. 
	
	For Christina to share her mutual love of fish and parasites with someone who would be by her side 24/7, it made her feel less lonely, especially since Blanche wasn't here.

speaker: Christina
text: Look at this little guy. This snail, having been made a thrall of the worm it has ingested, will become the vector of its ultimate plan: To embed itself in this killifish.

speaker: Christina
text: Isn't it cute?

speaker: Pasaya
text: Moreso fascinating.

speaker: Christina
text: Oh, you'll love it, this book's got great diagrams of the whole euhaplorchis life cycle.

speaker: Narrator
text: Eventually, Christina gets the text from Blanche. To meet at the place near the library for a late coffee and sandwiches. She promised to pay for the sandwiches within reason.

speaker: Narrator
text:
When they had arrived, Blanche sat at a booth on the couch side, Christina sat on a chair instead. Blanche calls over a waiter for the promised coffee and sandwiches, meanwhile Christina is hunched over the table.
	
	A few minutes pass, and while Blanche is peering out the window enjoying her food and drink, Christina's coffee and sandwich were sitting there untouched. 
	
	She was beginning to rethink this. She worried that she'd push her away with a confession. She did have a tendency to push people out of her life, and Blanche was the last person she'd want to lose.

speaker: Christina
text: Blanche.

speaker: Blanche
text: Yeah?

speaker: Christina
text: I want to be blunt with you, if that's okay?

speaker: Blanche
text: About the project?

speaker: Blanche
text: Please, that can wait until you get your-

speaker: Narrator
text:
Christina suddenly stands up, and bends over towards Blanche on the other side of the table. Her demeaner and face changes. 
	
	Christina should have a shocked expression on her face right now, but her body is just not obeying her.

speaker: Christina
text: We have work to do, I want to be quick with you.

speaker: Narrator
text:
She grabs Blanche by the collar of her blouse and yanks her out of the booth. 
	
	Pushing her body close, she puts her right arm around Blanche's body and pulls her towards hers, pressing their lips together into a peachy-coffee aromatic mess. 
	
	Their chests press together and they can feel each other's pulse.

speaker: Blanche
text: Mmmh!

speaker: Narrator
text:
It was what she wanted, right? Blanche closed her eyes and met Christina's lips with hers, getting a mouthful of her breath. 
	
	She felt Christina's tongue sliding over her lips with a sweet taste like melted candy in her mouth. The two intertwining tongues compressed to wet tunnels, sharing their spit together. 
	
	The two of them were totally enraptured in their kiss.

speaker: Narrator
text:
Christina, whose body the worm had been using, was one of the three enjoying this most of all. 
	
	The excitement of being in the midst of a passionate kiss, without the fear, without the anxiety. 
	
	This was the ultimate voyeuristc fantasy, all the while you were still inside your own body. Christina soon felt a tingling sensation in her abdomen. It was satisfaction. It was sublime.

speaker: Narrator
text:
The three of them disengage. A saliva trail stretches between the two girls in full view of the dozen or so students and workers loitering around the cafe. All they can do is stare in awe.
	
	In their act, they had displaced everything they had on the table, knocking Blanche's sandwich and coffee all over the floor broadly and some napkins even end up between their shoes.

speaker: Christina
text: I love you Blanche.

speaker: Christina
text: You make me the happiest woman alive, all I ask is one thing. Could we be something more?

speaker: Blanche
text: Sure.

speaker: Blanche
text: I just... expected a warning or something. We made a mess.

speaker: Narrator
text: They cleaned up before they went their separate ways.

speaker: Pasaya
text: Did I pull it off?
